memoryArtifacts.headline: Married to Jane Waye
memoryArtifacts.description: Nicholas Kirkham (1433/4-1451) married Jane Waye, daughter and heiress of Robert Waye of Marsh in the parish of Newton St Cyres, Devon.

zh.Pitminster, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特比特明斯特
zh.Blagdon, Devon, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭戴文布拉格頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Kirkham Sr.於1434年3月4日出生在英國薩默塞特比特明斯特時，他的父親Robert Kirkham28歲，母親Elizabeth Scobell26歲。他於1460年與Jane Wrey在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1516年3月15日在英國米德萊可享年82歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭米德萊可。

zh-hans.Pitminster, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特比特明斯特
zh-hans.Blagdon, Devon, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰戴文布拉格頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Kirkham Sr.于1434年3月4日出生在英国薩默塞特比特明斯特时，他的父亲Robert Kirkham28岁，母亲Elizabeth Scobell26岁。他于1460年与Jane Wrey在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1516年3月15日在英国米德萊可享年82岁，埋葬在英国英格兰米德萊可。

nameMeanings.name: Kirkham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly northwestern): habitational name from any of the places in Lancashire and East Yorkshire named Kirkham. The placenames derive from Old Norse kirkja ‘church’ + Old English hām ‘village, homestead’ or Old Norse heim ‘homestead, estate’.
Possibly an altered form of German Kirchham, a habitational name from either of two places called Kirchham, in Austria or Bavaria.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Kirkham Sr. was born on 4 March 1434, in Pitminster, Somerset, England, his father, Robert Kirkham, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth Scobell, was 26. He married Jane Wrey in 1460, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 15 March 1516, in Middlesex, England, at the age of 82, and was buried in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Kirkham Sr. est né le 4 mars 1434, à Pitminster, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Robert Kirkham, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Scobell, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Jane Wrey en 1460, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 15 mars 1516, à Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Kirkham Sr. am 4. März 1434 in Pitminster, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Kirkham 28 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Scobell 26. Er hat 1460 in Devon, England Jane Wrey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. März 1516 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Middlesex, England und wurde in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Kirkham Sr. è nato il il 4 marzo 1434 nel Pitminster, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Robert Kirkham, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Scobell, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Jane Wrey nel 1460, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 marzo 1516, nel Middlesex, England, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Kirkham Sr.が1434年3月4日にイギリスソメルセトピトミンスターで生まれた時，父Robert Kirkhamは28歳，母Elizabeth Scobellは26歳であった。1460年にイギリスデボンでJane Wreyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1516年3月15日にイギリスミッドレセックスで82歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスミッドレセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Kirkham Sr.(이)가 1434년 3월 4일 영국 서머세트 피트민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Kirkham(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Scobell(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1460년 영국 데폰에서 Jane Wrey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1516년 3월 15일 영국 미들레세스에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에 묻혔다.

pt.4 March 1434–15 March 1516: 4 de março de 1434–15 de março de 1516
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Kirkham Sr. nasceu em 4 de março de 1434, em Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Kirkham, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Scobell, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Wrey em 1460, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de março de 1516, em Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Kirkham Sr. родился 4 марта 1434 г. в местности питминстир, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Kirkham было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Scobell, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Wrey в 1460 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 15 марта 1516 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.4 March 1434–15 March 1516: 4 de marzo de 1434–15 de marzo de 1516
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Kirkham Sr. nació el 4 de marzo de 1434, en Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Kirkham, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Scobell, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Jane Wrey en 1460, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de marzo de 1516, en Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
